versions.version_description: Full song with riff, chords, solo and lyrics.
All lyrics with their accompanying correctly named chords. Tablature of main riff and Bridge section. Full lyrics for Coda https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gF5LaVkDhyk.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Great song, the other chords didn't seem right to me, and the main tab was correct
but didn't have lyrics. So, here you go.
If you want it, I've put the intro here too. It's not too difficult to do - I like
to play the intro a couple of times then go straight into the chords from there.

Standard tuning, capo on the 2nd fret
Chords used: Em, G, D, A, C


[Intro]

[tab]e|-----------------|-----------------|
B|-----------------|-----------------|
G|-----------------|-----------------|
D|-----0-----0-----|-----0-----0-----| x2
A|---2-----2---2---|---2-----4---4---|
E|-0-----0-------0-|-3-----5-------5-|[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
  She says her love for me could never die[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
  But that'd change if she ever found out about you and I[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  Oh, but her love is cold[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
  It wouldn't hurt her if she didn't know, 'cause[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  When it gets too much[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D/B[/ch]
  I need to feel your touch[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  Cause when the feeling's right I'm gonna run all night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[tab]e|-----------------|-----------------|
B|-----------------|-----------------|
G|-----------------|-----------------|
D|-----0-----0-----|-----0-----0-----| x2
A|---2-----2---2---|---2-----4---4---|
E|-0-----0-------0-|-3-----5-------5-|[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
  She's got a heart of gold she'd never let me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
  But you're the one that always turns me on, you keep me coming round[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I know her love is true[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  But it's so damn easy making love to you[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  I got my mind made up[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D/B[/ch]
  I need to feel your touch[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you..            ..Yeah[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  Cause when the feeling's right I'm gonna stay all night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you..            ..Yeah[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you..            ..Oh[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  When the feeling's right I'm gonna run all night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you[/tab]


[Solo] (each phrase lasts two bars)

[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
e|-------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|
B|9/10-9-------------------|7/8-7-------------------|5/6-5-------------------|7/8-7-------------------|
G|--------9----------------|-------7----------------|-------5----------------|-------7----------------|
D|----------9--------------|---------7--------------|---------5--------------|---------7--------------| x2
A|-------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|
E|-------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|[/tab]

[tab][Lower Harmony] (second time through the above phrase)
  [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
e|-------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|
B|-------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|
G|9/11-9-------------------|7/9-7-------------------|5/7-5-------------------|7/9-7-------------------|
D|--------9----------------|-------7----------------|-------5----------------|-------7----------------|
A|----------11-------------|---------9--------------|---------7--------------|---------9--------------|
E|-------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|------------------------|[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
                            Ohhhhh..[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you..            ..Yeah[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  Cause when the feeling's right I'm gonna stay all night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you..            ..Ohh[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you..            ..Yeah[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
  When the feeling's right I'm gonna stay all night[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
      Oh, when the feeling's right now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
                  Oh      yeah[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  When the feeling's right now[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you              ..Oh[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
..Oh..                   ..Yeah[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  I'm gonna run to you[/tab]


[Outro]

[ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch]


The actual song slowly fades out, but you can't really do that playing acoustic.
So ending on an Em sounds alright to me.
Hope this sounds right to you, if not please leave a comment rather than just rating badly :)
Thanks, and have a nice day.
